name: @platform/persistence
description: Postgres-backed persistence layer for the Fanaa Platform AI Studio (PLATFORM.md §13). Implements the M6 `RunStore` contract against Prisma (`PrismaRunStore`), plus typed repositories for StudioDraft / StudioRun / StudioAsset / StudioEvent. Ships a `CompositeRunStore` that dual-writes to file + Prisma during the M10 rollout so the file-backed M9 SSE watcher keeps working.
